# ADR-005 Phase 2b — pinned Python deps for the MTEB sanity harness.
#
# Update protocol:
#   1. Bump the version below.
#   2. Re-run the live harness against the new mteb release.
#   3. If task primary-metric keys shifted, update
#      `tests/fixtures/mteb/runner.py::_PRIMARY_METRIC_KEYS` and
#      `_extract_primary_from_scores_blob` together.
#   4. Re-pin `tests/fixtures/mteb/expected_scores.json` from the
#      MTEB leaderboard rendered against this version of mteb.
#
# Range rationale: 1.12+ introduced the TaskResult/.scores shape the
# runner targets first; we cap at <2.0 so a future major bump doesn't
# silently break the parser. The runner also handles the older 1.x
# dict-of-dicts shape as a fallback so an operator running an older
# mteb still gets a useful result instead of an opaque crash.
mteb>=1.12.0,<2.0.0

# numpy + requests are explicit (mteb declares them transitively, but
# pinning the floor keeps the harness reproducible).
numpy>=1.24
requests>=2.28
